note: Author's own research page (yihao-yuan.com/research) lists 'Exclusive Contracts in the Video Streaming Market' as 'Revise & Resubmit' at Econometrica. Also on SSRN (abstract_id=5757166). Sole author.

NBER WP w34180 (2025). Author's research statement (bradleysetzler.com/files/Setzler-Research.pdf) states: 'This paper received a revise and resubmit request from Econometrica in December of 2025.' Sole author.

Job market paper; author's research page lists no journal (no R&R/forthcoming). Won 2025 ASHEcon Student Paper Award. Also UPenn dissertation repository. Sole author. Now postdoc at Yale/Tobin, AP at Columbia 2026.

authors: Paul T. Scott; Eduardo Souza-Rodrigues; Ted Rosenbaum; Skand Goel
note: Paul Scott's CV lists 'Cows and Trees, 2025' under 'Working Papers and Work in Progress' with no journal. Paper draft dated Jan 26 2026. Presented at AEA 2026. Authors from paper header: Scott, Souza-Rodrigues, Rosenbaum, Goel.

authors: Tirza J. Angerhofer; Allan Collard-Wexler; Matthew Weinberg
note: Collard-Wexler's papers page lists it under 'Working Papers' with no journal/status ('joint with Tirza Angerhofer and Matt Weinberg'). Draft dated Nov 14 2024. Available via FTC and Yale. No R&R evidence found.
Author's research page lists this paper (his JMP) as 'Revise and resubmit' at Journal of Political Economy. 2024 YEEA finalist / 2023 best JMP award. Sole author. Now at LSE.

Author's site (arosenbe.github.io) lists 'Regulating Firearm Markets: Evidence from California' under 'Working papers' marked '(Job market paper)', no journal. Stanford. Sole author. (Duplicate of cowles2025-06.)

authors: Federico Ciliberto; Alon Eizenberg; Max Schnidman
note: Cowles presenter Alon Eizenberg. Full authorship (Ciliberto, Eizenberg, Schnidman) confirmed via Eizenberg's Nov 2025 announcement of the joint airline-coordination paper; draft last revised Mar 27 2025. No journal/R&R found in databases; recent working paper, presented Harvard/MIT/Princeton Nov 2025.

published_title: Intermediaries in Decentralized Markets: Evidence from Used-Car Transactions
authors: Fei Li; Charles Murry; Can Tian; Yiyi Zhou
note: Cowles presenter Fei Li. Fei Li's website lists 'Intermediaries in Decentralized Markets: Evidence from Used-Car Transactions, with Charles Murry, Can Tian, and Yiyi Zhou, R&R JPE'. Also NBER WP w34136 (Aug 2025). Title changed from agenda's 'Roles of Intermediaries'.
Author's site (gi-kim.com) lists this JMP under working papers with no journal/R&R. Won AREUEA Best Junior Scholar Paper 2025, Brattle award. Sole author. Now AP at Boston College.

published_title: Dynamic Search in a Non-Stationary Search Environment: An Application to the Beijing Housing Market
authors: Ying Fan; Ziying Fan; Yiyi Zhou
note: Cowles presenter Yiyi Zhou. Ying Fan's CV lists the paper (2025, joint with Ziying Fan and Yiyi Zhou) with no journal/R&R. NBER WP w33528 / CESifo WP 11709. Agenda dropped 'Search' from title.
Same paper as iosp2026-09. Author's site lists 'Regulating Firearm Markets: Evidence from California' as a working paper / job market paper, no journal. Stanford. Sole author.
Kohlhepp's CV explicitly lists 'The Inner Beauty of Firms' as 'Revise and Resubmit at Review of Economic Studies.' Won Oliver Williamson Best Conference Paper (SIOE). Sole author. UNC Chapel Hill.

authors: Kirill Borusyak; Mauricio Caceres Bravo; Peter Hull
note: Cowles presenter Peter Hull. Hull's working-papers page lists 'Estimating Demand with Recentered Instruments' (with Borusyak and Caceres Bravo) under Applied Econometrics working papers, updated April 2025, no journal/R&R. arXiv:2504.04056.
